g.text: Overall outcome — converging evidence across all four methods indicates BCHAIN-ACCESS is usable, understandable, and accessible, supporting inclusive

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; fill: #20242a

g.text: interaction while maintaining security and compliance.

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #4a515a

g.text: Next step — empirical validation with people with disabilities (PwDs) in real-world healthcare environments.
